Settings.AIGeneratedNotice:
This AI-generated material is:

  • Unofficial, and not part of any official KULT: Divinity Lost publication,
  • Not approved, endorsed, or reviewed by Helmgast or the rights holders of KULT,
  • Provided freely and separately via the k4lt-assets-ai module,
  • Disabled by default, and only activated with the Game Master's explicit consent.

This content was created to enrich the virtual tabletop experience while remaining clearly distinguishable from official material. It follows a distinct artistic direction and narrative tone to avoid any confusion with canonical KULT content.
